generated_oml:
instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manufacturing environment where MABI MAX 100 robot operates"
    base:contains SerialRobotMABIMAX100
]

instance SerialRobotMABIMAX100 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes"
    base:contains Motor, Gearbox, Controller
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor driving the axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:contains MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance Gearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox component of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:contains GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for operation management"
]

instance SafetyConstraint : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Safety constraints limiting actuation range to prevent mechanical damage or unsafe conditions"
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder at motor for real-time feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData, OutputAngleData
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder at gearbox for real-time feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData, OutputAngleData
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time series data of input current transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time series data of output angle transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data record for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler, DataManagementEnabler
]

instance OutputAngleDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle data record for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler, DataManagementEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for system components, interfaces, and interconnections across abstraction levels"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT, SysMLIBD, SimulinkTool, DataDrivenUpdateEnabler
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL model for system components, interfaces, and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADL, RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT, DataDrivenUpdateEnabler
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc model for system components, interfaces, and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcADL, RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT, DataDrivenUpdateEnabler

instance SysMLStateMachine : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machine for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBD, RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT, DataDrivenUpdateEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcADL, RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT, DataDrivenUpdateEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance CppModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance JavaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:enables ModelImprovementService

    DTDFVocab:enables ModelImprovementService

    DTDFVocab:enables ModelImprovementService

    DTDFVocab:enables ModelImprovementService

    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelImprovementService

    base:desc "Java programming language for detailed modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelImprovementService

instance DataManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data management for integrating heterogeneous stakeholder perspectives across modeling tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing real-time data streams for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance DataDrivenUpdateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Methodology for integrating data-driven updates with existing system models during operation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelImprovementService
]

instance ModelImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous model improvement through iterative refinement based on real-time data feedback"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinementInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization in dashboards for user interaction"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight, MotionAccuracyRecommendation
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of joint friction in robotic systems through analytics"
]

instance MotionAccuracyRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Actionable recommendations to improve motion accuracy based on joint friction insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for model refinement based on data-driven updates"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow Reference Model (Fig. 1) is a UML class diagram defining components including Purpose, DataTrace, Asset, Processing, and Model. The concrete implementation integrates mechanical structure modeling, friction behavior simulation, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), live-data linking from the physical robot, and dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated by comparing simulated outputs with measured physical data; uncertainty is quantified and reduced through optimized sensor arrangement, with continuous improvement cycles for model accuracy and reliability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication via MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Relevant industry standards include SysML for model-based systems engineering, AADL for architecture description, ACME as a framework for architecture description, MontiArc for component-based modeling, SPES for embedded systems engineering, RFLP for requirements, functions, logic, physics modeling, and OOSEM for object-oriented software engineering methods. These standards are applied across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer) to ensure structured system modeling and interoperability."
]
